title: Hot Melt Glue Sticks 11x150mm Clear Adhesive for 11mm Hot Glue Gun - 40 Pack
features: 【Includes】 A total of 40pcs transparent hot glue sticks, diameter 11mm, length 150mm, suitable for 11mm hot glue gun.
【All-purpose Color】Transparent color is used in a wider range, paste with the clear glue will not leave a bad mark.
【High-quality Material】Made of environmentally-friendly EVA, no odor, super strong adhesion, easy to use, only 8-10 seconds to cure quickly.

【Extensive Application】Suitable for making and pasting various DIY such as jewelry, toys, crafts, box, decorations and more. Can be applied to a variety of materials such as plastic, paper, metal, wood, glass, fabric, ceramics and more.
【Good Packaging】The package uses a hard and stable box to protect the product from squeezing. Open the box and you will see the perfect product.
description: Product description Product Name: Hot melt glue stick, Adhesive Color: Transparent Size: 11mm x 150mm Quantity: 40 Material: High quality EVA Features: Environmental protection, low temperature glue stick, super sticky If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us and we will give you the best service. Common Customer Questions & Answers Question: Can these 11mm glue sticks be used on a 7mm glue gun? Answer: You can not use these 11mm glue sticks on a 7mm glue gun, the 7mm glue gun's pipe is too small to fit. Question: Are they worth the money? Answer: Great value for money!! 5 STARS!! Thoroughly recommend!!!! Safety Warning Don't touch the melted glue while in use.
